# Lumen

> Vision-first browser agent for Node.js

## Docs

- [Quickstart](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/quickstart): Install and run your first browser agent in under a minute
- [Getting Started](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/getting-started): Full setup guide with multi-run sessions, streaming, browser options, and safety
- [Best Practices](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/best-practices): Tips for building reliable browser agents
- [Basic Usage](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/use-cases/basic): One-shot tasks, multi-run sessions, streaming events, pre-navigation
- [Data Extraction](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/use-cases/data-extraction): Extracting structured data from web pages
- [Verifying Completion](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/use-cases/verification): UrlMatchesGate, ModelVerifier, CustomGate, and ActionVerifier
- [Safety & Control](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/use-cases/safety): Domain restriction and pre-action hooks
- [Navigating Tricky Sites](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/use-cases/site-knowledge): SiteKB domain-matched rules for site-specific quirks
- [Browser Connections](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/use-cases/browsers): Local Chrome, CDP endpoints, and Browserbase cloud browsers
- [Model Configuration](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/use-cases/models): Provider selection, local models, extended thinking, planner model
- [Session Management](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/use-cases/sessions): Serialize and resume agent sessions
- [Error Handling & Retries](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/use-cases/error-handling): API retries, action error recovery, fatal errors
- [Action Caching](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/use-cases/caching): Cache model decisions for repeated tasks
- [Stealth & Anti-Detection](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/use-cases/stealth): Browserbase, persistent profiles, pre-configured Chrome
- [Observability](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/use-cases/observability): Logging, tracing, and debugging agent runs
- [Evaluations](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/use-cases/evaluations): WebVoyager eval framework with LLM judge and retry
- [MCP Integration](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/use-cases/mcp): Wrap Lumen as an MCP tool server
- [Advanced](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/guide/use-cases/advanced): Advanced patterns and configuration
- [Architecture Overview](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/architecture/overview): How Lumen works internally
- [Comparison](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/architecture/comparison): Lumen vs other browser agent frameworks
- [API Reference](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/reference/api): Full API documentation
- [API Options](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/reference/options): All configuration options
- [Papers & Projects](https://lumen.omxyz.dev/reference/references): Research papers and related projects
